policy.purpose: Maintain verified backup interfaces for market brief sources; this is not local snapshot retention.
policy.backup_ready_rule: candidate endpoint must fetch successfully and its returned items must be consistent with the official page presentation in a recent verification run
policy.publish_rule: backup endpoint may be used only when marked backup_ready; degraded publication still requires explicit operator approval
policy.failover_policy: primary_first; use backup_ready candidate only when primary fails current run; automatically return to primary once primary verifies healthy again; backup is not a permanent replacement
policy.failback_rule: if primary endpoint succeeds in a later run, clear failover and use primary immediately
policy.operator_rule: if no backup_ready candidate exists, block/report rather than publish degraded unless Alex explicitly approves
policy.public_repo_note: Concrete source interface URLs, parameters, signatures and field mappings are intentionally not published. Keep the operational registry in the installed local workspace only.

sources.name: Example Market Source Family
sources.note: Replace this example with locally verified interfaces in the installed private registry. Do not commit operational endpoints.
